beIN SPORTS 7.desc: A cornerstone of the early-season WTA calendar, the Qatar TotalEnergies Open takes place on outdoor hard courts at the Khalifa International Tennis & Squash Complex in Doha. A 56-player singles draw competes for 1000 ranking points and a $4,088,211 USD total financial commitment, attracting the world’s top players.
